_what: The design token registry — THE source of truth for the look. emit.py compiles this → ../design-system.css (which every mockup links). Edit here, never the generated CSS. Add a token = add an entry (extend-by-registration); add a category = add a group. Each token is {"v": value} (flat) or {"ref": <primitive>} (resolves to a primitive — change the primitive in one place, every ref follows).
_palette_note: GOLD-PRIMARY WARM THEME (Tim, 2026-06-07, final): gold is THE primary colour + theme, NO green/mint/teal anywhere; the dark base is WARM charcoal (not cold blue-black); persona sub colour families are PASTELS within the gold world. Realised to match design/mockups/SCENARIO-PLAYER.html. The single primitive `gold` (#e6ab5c) feeds acc/ok/kind-process (the alive/done/process signal). CRITICAL — status-by-colour is preserved by a TWO-VIVID + ONE-MUTED split (a single gold band cannot hold three vivid signals apart): sig=gold (vivid, yellow-lean), await=orange-amber (vivid, pushed oranger so it leans away from gold toward orange but not into the coral fail), wire/kind-content=a DESATURATED bronze/taupe (pulled OFF the vivid axis — 'building/structural' reads muted, not a third competing signal). fail stays coral. cache is a lone warm-cool taupe-grey (a single neutral helps the four-way fit-bar read apart). Verified by rendering the .bi-card phase row + the .fit-bar four-segment at 1440 — four distinct reads by sight.

groups.name: surface tiers
groups.note: WARM charcoal base (warm/umber undertone, not blue-black) — mirrors SCENARIO-PLAYER.html's warmed dark base. tx warmed to a soft cream so text-on-charcoal reads warm.

groups.name: signal + semantic
groups.note: acc/ok = gold (the alive/done/value signal — the identity colour). acc-dim = a warm bronze (the dim signal, was green #2c6b5c). acc-deep = deep bronze-gold (the grounded end of the flow). acc-glow = the instrument's whole glow (scrim/indicated/bi-outcome/rhm-afford all read from it) — gold at .16. await = orange-amber (vivid, leans orange — distinct from the gold acc by hue-direction + saturation; trapped between gold and the coral fail, orange is its lane). cache = a warm taupe-grey neutral (the one near-cool, helps the fit-bar four-way read; needs-Tim's-eye for full-warm).

groups.name: ink on bright surfaces
groups.note: The near-black text colour that sits ON accent/await/fail coloured chips, badges, primary buttons (legibility on bright fills). Recurs corpus-wide; promoted from hardcoded literals 2026-06-05; ink-fail added 2026-06-07. ink-accent warmed to a warm near-black (#1c1304) for the gold-primary theme (was the cold-green #06140f) — the legible ink ON gold fills, mirrors the mockup.

groups.name: node-type visual language
groups.note: KIND drives colour. REALITY (audit 2026-06-03): only TWO kinds live — process & content. 'present' is contract-allowed but has no live node (future). 'model' is a config-slot accent, NOT a node kind. GOLD-PRIMARY (2026-06-07): kind-process = gold (the process signal IS the accent). kind-content (the 'wire/building' tone) is pulled OFF the vivid axis to a DESATURATED bronze/taupe so it reads muted beside the vivid gold(sig)+orange(await) — the unlock that keeps build-lifecycle states apart (the mockup's gold-tan #d9b46a has no triage lanes to separate, so it never needed this). kind-present = gold (the gold-grade). kind-model = a soft warm mauve (the one off-warm config accent — distinct from the warm world without being green).

groups.name: typography — the commander's-bridge voice
groups.note: THE TYPE SYSTEM (wave-2 design-direction, 2026-06-07). The running app's de-facto pairing — promoted from raw 'Fraunces'/'IBM Plex Mono' string literals scattered across canvas/app/src/app.css into registry tokens so the look assembles FROM the registry, not bolt-on (law 2). DIRECTION: a dark instrument / commander's bridge — a monospace INSTRUMENT BODY (IBM Plex Mono) for precision + machine-truth, a Fraunces SERIF DISPLAY for authority/headings (the calm-authority signature: serif-in-a-cockpit, not generic-dashboard sans). Fraunces added to the imports beside Bricolage (Bricolage stays for the mockup corpus' .display; the running app wears Fraunces). --font-display = Fraunces serif (titles, RHM voice, node output, panel headings); --font-mono = IBM Plex Mono (every control, label, value, address — the instrument body); --font-body aliases mono (the app's base font IS mono — the precision read). The type SCALE is a coherent modular ladder (no more scattered 8/8.5/9/9.5/10/10.5/11/11.5/12/12.5/13/13.5/14/15/16/19 literals); steps named by ROLE so a region picks intent, not a number.

groups.name: living instrument — presence, glow flow, persona pastels
groups.note: THE LIVING-INSTRUMENT layer (2026-06-07) — the depth + motion + presence the flat/static surface lacked, sourced from design/mockups/SCENARIO-PLAYER.html so it reflows from the registry too (law 2). gold-hi/gold/gold-deep = the gold RANGE (light → primary → deep bronze) the presence orb + accent flow paint with. acc-flow = the primary gold gradient (the orb conic, the send button, the active step, the run strip — the 'alive' fill). orb-hi = the bright specular highlight on the presence orb. PERSONA PASTELS: the personas are PASTEL sub colour families WITHIN the gold world (Tim, 2026-06-07). Vi = the canonical primary GOLD; Atlas = a soft APRICOT pastel; Nova = a soft ROSE-GOLD pastel. These are DEFINED here as tokens; the app currently runs Vi=gold as the live default (App.tsx does not set data-persona — switching Atlas/Nova would need controller markup, out of this styling lane), so Atlas/Nova are DEFINED-NOT-LIVE — ready for a future persona switch, no fiction. The persona-* tokens give the per-persona acc/acc-deep/acc-glow/acc-flow/orb-hi a future [data-persona] rule swaps in.

groups.name: shape — a coherent space + radius + elevation scale
groups.note: shadow-color added 2026-06-07 — the near-black drop-shadow colour the mockups' bespoke node/sheet box-shadows recurred (#000 ×12). G-22 FIX (wave-2 design-direction): the old scale was 3 colliding steps (--r 7px / --r-lg 11px / --sp 8px) — incoherent + value-overloaded. REPLACED with a coherent modular ladder. SPACE is a base-4 ramp (--sp-1..--sp-6 = 4·8·12·16·24·32) so every gap/pad reads on one rhythm; --sp kept = base-8 (8px, the legacy default — now an explicit alias of --sp-2). RADII harmonised to a 3-step ramp (--r-sm 5 / --r 8 / --r-lg 12) + --r-pill; --r nudged 7→8 and --r-lg 11→12 so radii sit ON the 4-grid too (one rhythm for space AND corners). The token NAMES are unchanged so every existing var(--r)/var(--sp) reference keeps resolving — only the values rationalised; the global re-screenshot verifies no regression. --elev-1/-2 = the two elevations (rail/panel vs floating card/sheet) so depth is a token, not a per-region literal.
